osteoFinalCtaTitle: Ready to perform sinus lift safely?
osteoFinalCtaText: We will match Osteosinus Kit to your technique and level of complexity.
osteoHeroTitle:
CONTROLLED
SINUS LIFT
WITH MAXIMUM
SAFETY
osteoHeroLead: A kit of instruments for gradual and controlled sinus membrane elevation and site preparation.
osteoDetailsLead:
The instruments provide gradual expansion.
The load is distributed evenly.
The sinus membrane is elevated safely.
osteoStep1Text: A channel is created in the bone
osteoStep2Text: The bone is condensed and expanded
osteoStep4Text: The implant is placed into the prepared site
osteoSystemLead: Osteosinus Kit includes instruments for different sinus lift stages, from access creation to membrane elevation and site preparation.
osteoTool1Text: For standard access and work along a straight axis
osteoTool2Text: For limited access and complex anatomy
osteoTool3Text: For site preparation and bone condensation
osteoTool4Text: For creating access to the sinus
osteoTool5Text: For widening the bone base and increasing elasticity
osteoSafetyText: Gradual work with bone reduces the risk of sinus membrane damage.
